title: stevia vernicosa
intro: Stevia vernicosa is a species of flowering plant in the sunflower family, native to the southwestern region of South America, and is closely related to the more well-known Stevia rebaudiana. The medicinal properties of Stevia vernicosa include its potential anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, which have been observed in various studies. The health benefits of Stevia vernicosa are not as well-documented as those of Stevia rebaudiana, but it is believed to have similar properties that can help lower blood sugar levels and improve oral health. Stevia vernicosa can be used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are typically used to support digestive health and provide antioxidants.
